about.title: ABOUT US
about.paragraph1: Galler is India's leading industrial solution provider in the field of Electronics and Software. Founded in 1995, At present, it has more than 450 employees and more than 4 subsidiaries with business covering PAN India.
about.paragraph2: The company focuses on the design, research and development, production of mechanical & Electro - mechanical Smart devices. It is one of the enterprises in India that focuses on the R&D of industrial electronics products. Rooted in care technology and focused on innovative applications in the industry, Galler provides customized solutions in retail, finance, petroleum, manufacturing, transportation and other industries.

banner.description: We are a team dedicated to precision engineering, delivering solutions that shape industries worldwide. Our journey is defined by trust, quality, and a commitment to excellence in every project.

journey.heading: Engineering trust and
journey.storyParagraph1: We started with a vision to redefine manufacturing standards and provide solutions that industries can rely on. Over the years, we have grown into a team of skilled professionals equipped with cutting-edge technology, serving clients across diverse sectors and geographies.
journey.storyParagraph2: What drives us is not just producing components, but delivering value — ensuring every part we manufacture contributes to our client's success. Our commitment to quality, timely delivery, and innovation has helped us establish long-term partnerships with leading businesses worldwide.

milestones.description: Exploring new avenues to provide creative and customized solutions across various industries.
Fuel Automation for Petroleum - Reliance BP Mobility Limited.
Telecom Infra networking & monitoring systems - Reliance Jio Infocomm Limited.
Electro Mechanical Solutions - Reliance Jio Infocomm Limited.

introSection.title: WE PUT OUR CLIENT'S REQUIREMENTS IN THE FOREFRONT.
introSection.paragraph1: We at Galler thrive on innovation and pushing the bounds of technology to solve our customers' most pressing challenges. We combine designing, developing, and manufacturing to produce leading product solutions.
introSection.paragraph2: Galler is a leading, end to end engineering solutions and product company. As a disruptive innovation company Galler navigates the business landscape via industry knowledge and digital capabilities.

cards.title: FEASIBILITY STUDIES
cards.description: We examine the key technical challenges, key components of unit cost and then assess the likely impact of those technical challenges on meeting the product specification which helps in estimating & optimizing the project tasks and schedules to address uncertainties early in engineering development.

cards.title: METHOD ENGINEERING
cards.description: We help refining product requirements by eliciting additional content, distinguishing the imperative from the desirable, and alerting to the design impact of severe provisions. This helps in creating Technical Specifications to guide and track our engineering development of products.

cards.title: SHAPING CONCEPTS
cards.description: We shape your concepts by providing a technical vision of how a product idea can be made tangible in construction and performance, including materials, manufacturing processes and product requirements.

members.name: Vansh Agarwal
members.description:
Dhoni made his international debut for the India national cricket team in 2004, and within a short period, he became one of the most dangerous wicketkeeper-batsmen in world cricket. His aggressive batting style, powerful finishing ability, and fearless approach made him a fan favorite. One of his early memorable innings was his explosive 148-run knock against Pakistan, which announced his arrival as a future star.

As captain, Dhoni led India into its most successful era in cricket history. Under his leadership, India won the inaugural ICC World Twenty20 in 2007, the historic 2011 Cricket World Cup in 2011, and the ICC Champions Trophy 2013 in 2013. He remains the only captain in cricket history to win all three major ICC white-ball trophies, proving his exceptional leadership and ability to perform under pressure.

products.name: Access Control Locks
products.description: Galler manufactures intelligent access control lock systems designed for telecom sites and secure facilities, enabling card-based authentication with real-time monitoring and unauthorized access prevention.
keyFeatures: Enabling visitors or employees to access sites/doors via card
Enabling visitors or employees to access sites/doors via card

products.name: Outdoor Cabinet Locks
products.description: Weatherproof, low-power locking solutions engineered for outdoor telecommunications cabinets, offering high durability and remote monitoring capabilities for field-deployed infrastructure.

products.name: Remote Telemetric Unit
products.description: An IoT-enabled telemetric unit for real-time data collection and transmission across telecom and utility applications, with multi-sensor integration and cloud connectivity.

products.name: DC Energy Meter
products.description: Multi-channel DC energy measurement device built to address telecom power monitoring challenges, with accurate logging, analytics, and remote configuration support.
